name: Hartley's School Buses
registry_source: North Dakota Secretary of State (via OpenCorporates/business directories)
notes: Confirmed match - exact address 2830 Hwy 2 W Rugby ND 58368 matches input. Family-owned school bus operator since 1969; formal NJ incorporation 03/19/1987 as HARTLEY'S SCHOOL BUSES, INC. Also has a Kalispell, MT location; Blue Bird dealership in MT and ND since 1973. ~31 employees per business directory estimates, ~$9M annual revenue. School bus charter service + bus sales/service. MCS-150 last updated 07/09/2025. Note: only 1 power unit reported in MCS-150 may understate fleet (most routes likely under separate intrastate/school district contracts not reported to FMCSA as power units).
